lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar sat naam karataa purakh nirbhau niravair akaal moorat ajoonee saibhan gur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗੂਜਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਚਉਪਦੇ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: raag goojaree mahalaa 1 chaupade ghar 1 |
lines.english: Raag Goojaree, First Mehl, Chau-Padhay, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰੀ ਚਨਣਾਠੀਆ ਜੇ ਮਨੁ ਉਰਸਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: teraa naam karee chananaattheea je man urasaa hoe |
lines.english: I would make Your Name the sandalwood, and my mind the stone to rub it on;

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣੀ ਕੁੰਗੂ ਜੇ ਰਲੈ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪੂਜਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: karanee kungoo je ralai ghatt antar poojaa hoe |1|
lines.english: for saffron, I would offer good deeds; thus, I perform worship and adoration within my heart. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਹਰਿ ਦੇਵ ਪਖਾਲੀਅਹਿ ਜੇ ਮਨੁ ਧੋਵੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: baahar dev pakhaaleeeh je man dhovai koe |
lines.english: If one were to wash his heart inwardly, like the stone idol which is washed on the outside,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਜਾ ਕੀਚੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਪੂਜ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: poojaa keechai naam dhiaaeeai bin naavai pooj na hoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Perform worship and adoration by meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord; without the Name, there is no worship and adoration. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੂਠਿ ਲਹੈ ਜੀਉ ਮਾਜੀਐ ਮੋਖ ਪਇਆਣਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jootth lahai jeeo maajeeai mokh peaanaa hoe |2|
lines.english: his filth would be removed, his soul would be cleansed, and he would be liberated when he departs. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਸੂ ਮਿਲਹਿ ਚੰਗਿਆਈਆ ਖੜੁ ਖਾਵਹਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਦੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: pasoo mileh changiaaeea kharr khaaveh amrit dehi |
lines.english: Even beasts have value, as they eat grass and give milk.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਵਿਹੂਣੇ ਆਦਮੀ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜੀਵਣ ਕਰਮ ਕਰੇਹਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naam vihoone aadamee dhrig jeevan karam karehi |3|
lines.english: Without the Naam, the mortal's life is cursed, as are the actions he performs. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੇੜਾ ਹੈ ਦੂਰਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਿਅਹੁ ਨਿਤ ਸਾਰੇ ਸੰਮੑਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: nerraa hai door na jaaniahu nit saare samaale |
lines.english: The Lord is hear at hand - do not think that He is far away. He always cherishes us, and remembers us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Goojaree, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਭਿ ਕਮਲ ਤੇ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਉਪਜੇ ਬੇਦ ਪੜਹਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਕੰਠਿ ਸਵਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: naabh kamal te brahamaa upaje bed parreh mukh kantth savaar |
lines.english: From the lotus of Vishnu's navel, Brahma was born; He chanted the Vedas with a melodious voice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਦੇਵੈ ਸੋ ਖਾਵਣਾ ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਚਾ ਹੇ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo devai so khaavanaa kahu naanak saachaa he |4|1|
lines.english: Whatever He gives us, we eat; says Nanak, He is the True Lord. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੋ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਲਖਣਾ ਆਵਤ ਜਾਤ ਰਹੈ ਗੁਬਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: taa ko ant na jaaee lakhanaa aavat jaat rahai gubaar |1|
lines.english: He could not find the Lord's limits, and he remained in the darkness of coming and going. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਜਨ ਪੂਰੇ ਮੁਨਿ ਜਨ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਗੁਰ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee bhagat kareh jan poore mun jan seveh gur veechaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The perfect beings perform devotional worship to Him. The silent sages serve Him through the Guru's Teachings. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਕਿਉ ਬਿਸਰਹਿ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਅਧਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: preetam kiau bisareh mere praan adhaar |
lines.english: Why should I forget my Beloved? He is the support of my very breath of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿ ਸਸਿ ਦੀਪਕ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣਿ ਏਕਾ ਜੋਤਿ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: rav sas deepak jaa ke tribhavan ekaa jot muraar |
lines.english: His lamps are the sun and the moon; the One Light of the Destroyer of ego fills the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਇ ਸੁ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਰੈਣਿ ਅੰਧਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh hoe su ahinis niramal manamukh rain andhaar |2|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh remains immaculately pure, day and night, while the self-willed manmukh is enveloped by the darkness of night. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਧ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਨਿਤ ਝਗਰਾ ਦੁਹੁ ਲੋਚਨ ਕਿਆ ਹੇਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: sidh samaadh kareh nit jhagaraa duhu lochan kiaa herai |
lines.english: The Siddhas in Samaadhi are continually in conflict; what can they see with their two eyes?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਧੁਨਿ ਜਾਗੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਝਗਰੁ ਨਿਬੇਰੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: antar jot sabad dhun jaagai satigur jhagar niberai |3|
lines.english: One who has the Divine Light within his heart, and is awakened to the melody of the Word of the Shabad - the True Guru settles his conflicts. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਨਾਥ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਅਜੋਨੀ ਸਾਚੈ ਮਹਲਿ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sur nar naath beant ajonee saachai mehal apaaraa |
lines.english: O Lord of angels and men, infinite and unborn, Your True Mansion is incomparable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਜਗਜੀਵਨ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sehaj mile jagajeevan nadar karahu nisataaraa |4|2|
lines.english: Nanak merges imperceptibly into the Life of the world; shower Your mercy upon him, and save him. ||4||2||
